policy.simulated_locked_note: Frozen-by-hash SIMULATED G1 baseline (real LOLA Haworth DEM + real dustgym slip + grounded IMU/wheel model). Reproducible and locked, but NOT a real-world capture; the real-world locked_validation (Katwijk) remains NOT_ACQUIRED.

development.role: runtime contract and fixed-reference stereo implementation
controlled component fixture, not release validation

simulated_locked.role: G1 passive wheel+IMU baseline capture (timestamped IMU 100 Hz + wheel odom 10 Hz + eval truth); the dead-reckoning ATE that solar/shadow/landmark cues must beat
simulated_locked.provenance: MEASUREMENT_MODEL_SIM: real LOLA Haworth DEM + real dustgym slip; IMU/wheel = grounded sensor model (g1_imu_wheel_params.json)
simulated_locked.stereo_note: synchronized stereo keyframes are NOT yet in this capture: the dustgym sidecar renders local ~5 m patches (far plane 100 m), not the ~88 m traverse, so per-pose stereo along the path needs sidecar scale work + the render loop. This remains a G1 gap.
simulated_locked.result_report: validation/g1_capture/g1_capture_result.json (derived; carries volatile build provenance -> NOT hash-locked; only the immutable sensor/truth data below is locked)
